mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: A unemployment rate exceeding 4.5 percent signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer spending expectations and triggers negative equity repricing within 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 60% of triggered instances or the signal loses statistical significance at the 95% confidence level.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deceleration in real GDP growth and retail sales indicates weakening aggregate demand that forces earnings downgrades and produces negative S&P 500 returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns with a Sharpe ratio above 0.5 over any 5-year out-of-sample period.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a late-cycle expansion reflects capacity utilization tightening that supports corporate margins and drives positive short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in 55% of observations during late-cycle phases or the autocorrelation of the signal drops below 0.1.

mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rates surpassing 2.0 percent trigger a liquidity contraction that increases discount rates and forces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: The signal generates positive forward returns in 65% of triggered cases or fails to achieve a t-statistic greater than 1.96.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in total nonfarm payrolls and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm robust labor demand that sustains earnings growth and yields positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal produces a negative information coefficient over rolling 3-year windows or fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark.

mechanism_narrative: Higher housing starts indicate strong residential investment and consumer confidence that translate into immediate positive equity market momentum over the following week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in 55% of observations or the signal predictive power vanishes after controlling for market beta.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 105 during a post-shock recovery phase signals persistent supply-side constraints that suppress corporate output and generate negative monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 60% of triggered instances or the mechanism fails to achieve a statistically significant negative slope in OLS regression.
